texto: The Frenchman showed her a great deal of Paris that day, saying over lunch at a café that it was impossible to see everything of interest in so short a time. "And of course the sights are only one aspect; there's also the theatre, the markets, clubs, festivals, gardens and much more."Delta smiled dreamily; it sounded wonderful.Enjoying her smile, Valois gave her cheek a playful caress. "If I try hard enough, you may never want to leave.
explicacao: Citação de Brooke Templar sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “The Frenchman showed her a great deal of Paris that day, saying over lunch at a café that it was …” articula motivacao, caress, love em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como love e paris.
